name: python3-neo4j
title: python3-neo4j
description:
Neo4j Bolt driver for Python (Python 3)
This package contains Neo4j driver for Python supports Neo4j 3.0 and above.
.
Warning: Connecting to Neo4j 4.X requires an unencrypted connection by default.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-neo4j because Neo4j Bolt driver for Python (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-neo4j as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-neo4j with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-neo4j --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
